postgres.label: Postgres focus
postgres.plan_line: Postgres for live metrics and application-database evidence.
postgres.base_notes: Query a Postgres database via Postgres MCP Pro in restricted (read-only) mode. Discover objects live before querying — list schemas and tables, inspect columns — do not assume a schema. SELECT-only: the server parses each statement and runs it in a read-only transaction. Prefer explicit column lists and bounded result sets over SELECT *.
